Agent Player

Version 1.3.0

Welcome to Agent Player

Transform your AI agents into a professional desktop application. This installer will guide you through the setup process in 8 easy steps.

Installation Directory

Choose where Agent Player will be installed on your computer.

Installation Path
Loading...
Required Space: ~900 MB
Default locations:
• Windows: C:\Program Files\AgentPlayer
• Linux: /opt/agent-player
• macOS: /Applications/Agent Player.app

Deployment Method

Choose how you want to deploy Agent Player.

🐳

Docker

Isolated containerized environment. Easy updates and rollback. Requires Docker Desktop/Engine.

✓ Recommended for Production
💻

Direct

Native installation with system service. Fastest performance. No container overhead.

✓ Best Performance
🌐

Server

Deploy to remote VPS/cloud via SSH. Automatic nginx + SSL setup. Access from anywhere.

✓ Remote Deployment

Configuration

Configure your Agent Player installation.

Admin Account

Create your administrator account.

Must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

Installing Agent Player

Please wait while we install and configure Agent Player...

Installation Complete!

Agent Player has been successfully installed and configured.
